plans.title: OAuth2 Client Advanced Lifecycle
plans.notes: Follow-on plan for ENG-1576. Focus: secret rotation and revoke/deactivate flow with safety guardrails.

plans.title: OAuth2 Client Management Post-Merge
plans.notes: All phases complete. QC tri-review approved (W1/W2 fixes applied). QA PASS: 8/8 criteria, 444 tests, 0 warnings. Residual findings RF-1 to RF-5 deferred. Branch: feature/oauth2-client-mgmt.

plans.title: Mainnet Disable Switch
plans.notes: QA SIGN-OFF: All acceptance criteria verified. 334 unit tests + 48 integration tests passing. Clippy clean, fmt clean. E2E 6/6 passed with correct exit code 10. Ready for merge.

plans.title: Skill Patterns Optimization
plans.notes: QA SIGN-OFF: All acceptance criteria verified. Skill update guidance added to xion-dev, xion-toolkit-init. Refresh-first authentication in xion-oauth2 v1.2.1. CLI --force flag implemented. Skill-creator iteration on xion-treasury (v1.2.1) and xion-asset (v1.1.0). 329 tests passing, clippy clean.

plans.title: REST API URL Fix - Separate Chain Query Endpoint
plans.notes: QA SIGN-OFF: 404 error resolved. Added rest_url field to NetworkConfig (api.xion-*.burnt.com). All chain queries now use REST endpoint. 375 tests passing, E2E verified.

plans.title: Faucet Command Implementation
plans.notes: QA SIGN-OFF: All criteria verified. CLI (327 tests), Skill v1.2.0 (32 triggers, 5 evals), Docs complete. QC fixes applied. Ready for merge.

plans.title: QC Cross-Review: Source Code & Skills
plans.notes: QA SIGN-OFF: All P3 fixes verified. Pre-commit checks passed: cargo test (48 passed), cargo clippy (0 warnings), cargo fmt. P3 fixes: P3-1 (CRIT-003 grace period ✅), P3-2 (WARN-012 already fixed ✅), P3-3 (WARN-010 already fixed ✅), P3-4 (WARN-015 already fixed ✅), P3-5 (WARN-013,017 sanitization ✅).

plans.title: Unified CI Workflow
plans.notes: Merged ci.yml, test-skills.yml, e2e-tests.yml into unified workflow with proper job dependencies. QA SIGN-OFF: All acceptance criteria validated - job dependencies correct, YAML valid, E2E config documented, artifact handling correct. Ready for production use.

plans.title: Skills Test Framework
plans.notes: Completed: 48 tests, 58 mock scenarios, CI integration, skill documentation updates

plans.title: CI/CD Integration Output
plans.notes: Completed: OutputFormat enum extended, ExecuteContext propagated to all handlers, exit_codes module added, docs/EXIT-CODES.md created. 298 tests passing.

plans.title: Predicted Address Computation
plans.notes: Dev complete: shared instantiate2 module, --predict and --salt flags, 17 new tests. Phase 4 (verify-address) deferred as optional. SIGN-OFF by @qa-engineer.

plans.title: Batch Treasury Operations
plans.notes: Dev complete: batch fund, batch grant-config commands, bulk export support. SIGN-OFF by @qa-engineer.

plans.title: Shell Completion Support
plans.notes: Completions command added for bash/zsh/fish/powershell. QC passed (0 critical), QA passed (all checks).

plans.title: Shell Completion --install Flag
plans.notes: QC issues fixed: proper error handling. All validation passed.

plans.title: Skill Parameter Validation Framework
plans.notes: QA SIGN-OFF: All 5 validation tests passed, 25 schemas verified, all QC issues fixed. Ready for production use.

removed.title: Treasury Analytics
removed.reason: On-chain queries too heavy for this toolkit; should use external indexing services
